active_cycle.goal: Prepare the repository for real smart-home evidence execution while preserving sample-vs-real and production-claim boundaries.

tasks.title: Sync STATUS and Issue 8
tasks.objective: Update STATUS.md and Issue #8 to reflect P0 semantic gate completion, current schema versions, and real evidence requirements.
allowed_work: Update STATUS.md and Issue #8 synchronization artifacts.
forbidden_work: Do not claim real evidence has been submitted.
Do not start the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: STATUS and Issue #8 reflect evidence requirements.

critique_findings: Status/issue sync had to preserve the no-real-evidence boundary.
completion.boundary: No real evidence was claimed, no real pilot was started, and Issue #8 remains open.

tasks.title: Define Issue-to-Packet bridge
tasks.objective: Create a bounded mapper specification for converting Issue #8 evidence into EVIDENCE_INTAKE_PACKET.submitted.json without silently inventing missing evidence.
allowed_work: Add bridge contract and validation fixtures.
forbidden_work: Do not scrape or infer absent evidence.
Do not auto-generate a submitted packet from incomplete Issue text.
acceptance_criteria: Unsafe text-only visual proof remains blocked.

critique_findings: The bridge must not make Issue #8 text equivalent to screenshot, export, DOM, CSS, accessibility, or live-render evidence.
completion.boundary: No submitted packet was generated, no real evidence was claimed, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add conflict summary to readiness path
tasks.objective: Add an evidence_conflict_summary requirement to readiness artifacts so unresolved conflicts remain visible and blocked downstream.
allowed_work: Extend readiness/conflict artifacts or docs with conflict summary fields.
forbidden_work: Do not resolve conflicts without rationale.
Do not loosen readiness gates.
acceptance_criteria: Unresolved blocking conflict cannot produce ready readiness.

critique_findings: Readiness previously exposed visible flags but needed durable conflict summary carry-forward.
completion.boundary: No conflict was resolved without rationale, no pilot was started, and no real evidence was claimed.

tasks.title: Prepare real pilot artifact slots
tasks.objective: Create template-only placeholder paths for real submitted artifacts without pretending real evidence exists.
allowed_work: Add template manifest and submitted-mode command documentation.
forbidden_work: Do not commit runtime .generated.json outputs.
Do not fabricate screenshots, hashes, or Elementor export data.
acceptance_criteria: Templates cannot pass as real submitted evidence.

critique_findings: Submitted-mode commands were documented as expected command shape only; templates remain non-evidence.
completion.boundary: Template-only; no generated submitted outputs; no real pilot authorization.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0001 through RQ-0004 and write the next bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review completed work and replenish bounded queue.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
acceptance_criteria: Every fifth task remains queue_refresh and blockers are preserved.

critique_findings: Refresh preserved completed history and did not fold schema compatibility into unrelated work.
completion.boundary: No real pilot was scheduled, no real evidence was claimed, and release-boundary prohibitions remain in force.

tasks.title: Add bridge semantic validation runner
tasks.objective: Add a dedicated E2E check for the issue-to-packet bridge so unsafe mappings fail outside generic schema validation.
allowed_work: Create bridge semantic validator and workflow step.
forbidden_work: Do not generate a submitted packet.
Do not mark Issue #8 evidence as complete.
acceptance_criteria: Dedicated validator rejects unsafe mappings.

critique_findings: The bridge semantic check must assert pilot blocking without treating Issue #8 as complete.
completion.boundary: No submitted packet was generated, no real evidence was claimed, Issue #8 remains evidence-pending, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add conflict-summary generated-report check
tasks.objective: Add a focused check proving blocker_conflicts become blocked_conflicting_evidence and carry conflict records forward.
allowed_work: Add conflict fixture and readiness assertions.
forbidden_work: Do not authorize pilot execution.
Do not treat sample conflict fixtures as real evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Generated readiness from conflict input blocks pilot start.

critique_findings: The self-test needed to explicitly lock the blocker_conflicts generated-report path.
completion.boundary: No pilot was authorized, no sample fixture was treated as real evidence, and missing-evidence/privacy blockers were not weakened.

tasks.title: Harden rolling queue schema compatibility
tasks.objective: Update the rolling queue schema so it accepts the current lifecycle and task positions without weakening validation.
allowed_work: Update queue schema and validator.
forbidden_work: Do not loosen validation enough to accept malformed records.
Do not remove the every-fifth queue_refresh invariant.
acceptance_criteria: Current queue validates and malformed queue records fail.

critique_findings: The schema needed to accept terminal lifecycle states while rejecting pending completion evidence.
completion.boundary: No completed task history was changed, no real evidence was claimed, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add submitted-mode command support
tasks.objective: Add bounded CLI handling for real submitted packet paths while preserving sample rejection rules.
allowed_work: Add --packet and submitted-mode safety checks.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer a submitted packet.
Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Sample fixtures remain rejected in submitted mode.

critique_findings: Readiness submitted mode must reuse the intake submitted-mode guard instead of trusting a packet path independently.
completion.boundary: No submitted packet was created, no real pilot was run, sample-vs-real rejection was tightened, and Issue #8 remains evidence-pending.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue after validation hardening set
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0006 through RQ-0009 and write the next four bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review merged PRs and CI outcomes and replenish queue.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
acceptance_criteria: At least four pending tasks remain after refresh.

critique_findings: RQ-0006 through RQ-0009 are merged validation-hardening tasks and should remain completed history.
completion.boundary: No real pilot was scheduled, no real evidence was claimed, sample-vs-real boundaries remain in force, and Issue #8 remains open.

tasks.title: Add readiness generated-output policy check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that generated readiness reports stay out of committed runtime outputs while allowing explicit temporary --out paths for validation.
allowed_work: Document or assert generated readiness output policy.
forbidden_work: Do not commit runtime .generated.json outputs as real evidence.
Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Generated readiness output remains validation-only.

critique_findings: PR #33 completed validator and STATUS work, but the active queue SSOT required a follow-up sync.
completion.boundary: No runtime generated output was committed as real evidence, no submitted packet was created, no real evidence was claimed, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add readiness provenance policy check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that readiness artifacts preserve source provenance and do not upgrade issue text, templates, or fixtures into real evidence.
allowed_work: Add focused validator assertion for evidence source provenance.
Keep the real submitted packet boundary unchanged.
forbidden_work: Do not infer missing screenshots, exports, hashes, or accessibility evidence.
Do not run the real pilot.
Do not weaken sample-vs-real rejection.
acceptance_criteria: Readiness cannot treat issue prose as visual evidence.
Templates and fixtures remain non-real evidence sources.
CI continues to pass without real pilot execution.

critique_findings: The validator and STATUS were already merged in PR #35, but the active queue SSOT still showed RQ-0012 as pending.
The safe correction is queue/status synchronization plus backlog replenishment, not a new readiness feature or real pilot execution.
The provenance validator preserves source_ref and boundary flags without upgrading Issue prose, templates, placeholders, or fixtures into real evidence.
completion.boundary: No missing screenshot/export/hash/accessibility evidence was inferred, no submitted packet was created, no real evidence was claimed, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add submitted readiness status contract check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that submitted-mode readiness cannot authorize pilot start unless the intake packet is a real_issue_submission and the readiness authorization scope remains shadow-mode only.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator assertion or fixture for submitted readiness authorization scope.
Document that submitted readiness still does not prove production, export, live-render, or accessibility validation.
Keep Issue #8 evidence-pending until real evidence exists.
forbidden_work: Do not run the real pilot.
Do not create submitted evidence.
Do not treat readiness authorization as production readiness.
acceptance_criteria: Submitted readiness authorization remains shadow-mode only.
Real pilot remains blocked without a real submitted packet and readiness pass.
CI continues to pass without real pilot execution.

critique_findings: The check must not create a committed submitted packet just to test the submitted readiness path.
Submitted readiness authorization must remain shadow-mode only and must keep production, release, export, live-render, and accessibility claims false.
Non-real packet origins must not be able to set real_pilot_allowed_to_start=true.
completion.boundary: No submitted evidence was created, no real pilot was run, no production/release/export/live-render/accessibility validation was claimed, and Issue #8 remains evidence-pending.

tasks.title: Add Issue #8 submitted-packet absence check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check or documentation assertion that Issue #8 evidence-pending state cannot be interpreted as a real submitted packet.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator or documentation check for absent submitted packet state.
Assert Issue #8 checklist/prose alone cannot satisfy real_issue_submission.
Keep queue and STATUS synchronized.
forbidden_work: Do not scrape or fabricate Issue #8 attachments.
Do not create a submitted packet.
Do not run the real pilot.
acceptance_criteria: Issue #8 evidence-pending state remains a blocker.
No text-only issue content is treated as a real packet.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue after submitted-readiness safety set
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0011 through RQ-0014, preserve completed history, reprioritize blockers, and write the next four bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review merged PRs and CI outcomes for RQ-0011 through RQ-0014.
Carry forward unresolved blockers without hiding partial work.
Add the next four pending tasks and the following queue-refresh task.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
Do not remove sample-vs-real boundaries.
Do not mark validator work complete without merged evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Every fifth task remains queue_refresh.
At least four pending executable tasks remain after refresh unless blocked on evidence.
Completed task history and blockers are preserved.

tasks.title: Add privacy-review submitted packet guard
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that a real submitted packet cannot pass submitted-mode readiness unless the privacy review fields are explicit and complete.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator assertion or fixture for submitted packet privacy-review completeness.
Document that absent privacy review keeps the real pilot blocked.
Keep sample-vs-real and Issue #8 evidence-pending boundaries unchanged.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer submitted evidence.
Do not scrape private attachments from Issue #8.
Do not run the real pilot or mark privacy review complete without evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Submitted-mode readiness requires explicit privacy-review completion before pilot authorization.
Missing privacy review remains a blocker.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.

tasks.title: Add submitted packet evidence-completeness contract check
tasks.objective: Add a bounded check that submitted-mode readiness cannot pass unless evidence_complete_definition and intake_verdict remain mutually consistent for a real_issue_submission packet.
allowed_work: Add a focused validator assertion or documentation check for submitted evidence-completeness consistency.
Keep the real pilot blocked when required evidence is absent or inconsistent.
Preserve sample-vs-real and production-claim boundaries.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer submitted evidence.
Do not run the real pilot.
Do not treat completeness flags as visual/export/accessibility validation evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Submitted-mode readiness fails when evidence_complete_definition is incomplete but intake_verdict attempts to allow pilot start.
Completeness consistency does not imply production, export, live-render, or accessibility validation.
CI continues to pass without real evidence execution.
